batch.jobdefinition.mountpoints.Containe.Description: The path on the container where the host volume is mounted.

batch.jobdefinition.mountpoints.ReadOnly.Description: If this value is `true`, the container has read-only access to the volume. Otherwise, the container can write to the volume. The default value is `false`.

batch.jobdefinition.mountpoints.SourceVo.Description: The name of the volume to mount.
